title: Headset version is changed
scenario: Headset firmware version not updated on Lens tenant inventory, Device profile, and Device user pages after DFU
steps: 1. Ensure the headset is registered to a Lens tenant.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Initiate a DFU (firmware update) on the headset via the app.
5. Wait for the firmware update to complete successfully.
6. Log in to the Lens tenant's web portal.
8. Locate the headset in the inventory list.
9. Navigate to the Device profile page for the headset.
10. Navigate to the Device user / Mobile user page for the associated user.
expected: The new headset firmware version is correctly displayed on the Lens tenant's Inventory page, Device profile page, and Device user/Mobile user page.
